---
title: "LRPGF05: Gain factors for phonetic spelling (P) — off-floor"

date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_convergence.qmd >}}

## Overview

LRPGF05 is the **gain-factors** model for phonetic spelling (`spphon`).

::: {.callout-important title="Floored outcome - off-floor likelihood"}

Phonetic spelling is **heavily floored** (most period post-scores are zero), so a
graded Beta-Binomial gain would be driven by a few dispersed tail values rather
than the factor contrasts. Following the suite's floor rule, the likelihood is a
**Bernoulli on the binary off-floor indicator** (period post $> 0$): the linear
predictor models the **log-odds of coming off the floor**. `beta_trt` is the
off-floor log-odds of being on intervention, and its items-scale marginal collapses
to the **off-floor risk difference** (reported with a provisional δ pending
education-lead sign-off).

:::

::: {.callout-important title="Causal labelling (DAG guardrails)"}

Only the randomised on-intervention term is causal (period-1 contrast). Own
baseline, age, ability (blocks) and the upstream skills letter sounds (L) and
blending (B) are **adjusted associations** confounded by latent general ability
(child random intercept repairs the time-invariant part) - "associated with",
never "drives". Sessions/dose are never conditioned on (collider); SES is excluded
(non-DAG / redundant).

:::

## Model

$$
(P_{\text{post}} > 0) \sim \operatorname{Bernoulli}(\operatorname{expit}(\eta)),\quad
\eta = \alpha + \alpha_{\text{period}} + \beta_{\text{trt}}\text{OnIntervention}
  + \gamma_{\text{own}}\operatorname{logit}_*(P_{\text{pre}}) + \gamma_A A_{\text{std}}
  + \gamma_{\text{ability}}z(\text{blocks}) + \sum_{s\in\{L,B\}}\gamma_s\operatorname{logit}_*(s_{\text{pre}})
  + \textstyle\sum\text{interactions} + u_{\text{child}}.
$$

No Beta-Binomial concentration (`kappa`) under the off-floor Bernoulli. Priors
follow the shared template in `priors.py`.

![Model diagram](model_graph.svg){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

{{< include _partials/_priors.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_prior_predictive.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_diagnostics.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_results_factors.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
